response.overview: A year after Zan's father's death, Shah now leads the Kampung Baru gangster gang. Madam Wong, the head of the Bangsar gang, senses that something bad is coming to KL. Soon after, Kuala Lumpur is shocked by a series of bombings. From Shameen's investigation, the bombings are closely linked to a mastermind who wants to destroy the KL Underworld gang. Elina wants to leave KL because she is worried about her daughter's safety, but Shah stops her and promises to protect them. Shah and his allies face an increasingly greater threat from outside.
response.title: KL Gangster Underworld Musim 2
